queries.question: What size are the swimming pools in Miami and what size are the hot tubs there?
queries.sql:
SELECT SwimmingPool.Size
FROM City JOIN Hotel ON City.ID = Hotel.ID JOIN SwimmingPool ON Hotel.ID = SwimmingPool.ID
WHERE City.Name = 'Miami'
UNION
SELECT HotTub.Capacity
FROM City JOIN Hotel ON City.ID = Hotel.ID JOIN HotTub ON Hotel.ID = HotTub.ID
WHERE City.Name = 'Miami'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?city a :City .
    ?hotel a :Hotels .
    ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
    ?swimmingpool a :SwimmingPool .
    ?swimmingpool p:hasHotel ?hotel .
    ?swimmingpool p:Size ?size .
    ?city p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Miami")
    BIND(?size AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?city a :City .
    ?hotel a :Hotels .
    ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
    ?hottub a :HotTub .
    ?hottub p:hasHotel ?hotel .
    ?hottub p:Capacity ?capacity .
    ?city p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Miami")
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Can you show me the sizes of all hot tubs in Miami along with the sizes of all swimming pools in any given location?
queries.sql:
SELECT SwimmingPool.Size
FROM City JOIN Hotel ON City.ID = Hotel.ID JOIN SwimmingPool ON Hotel.ID = SwimmingPool.ID
UNION
SELECT HotTub.Capacity
FROM City JOIN Hotel ON City.ID = Hotel.ID JOIN HotTub ON Hotel.ID = HotTub.ID
WHERE City.Name = 'Miami'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?city a :City .
    ?hotel a :Hotels .
    ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
    ?swimmingpool a :SwimmingPool .
    ?swimmingpool p:hasHotel ?hotel .
    ?swimmingpool p:Size ?size .
    BIND(?size AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?city a :City .
    ?hotel a :Hotels .
    ?hotel p:hasCity ?city .
    ?hottub a :HotTub .
    ?hottub p:hasHotel ?hotel .
    ?hottub p:Capacity ?capacity .
    ?city p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Miami")
    BIND(?capacity AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What size are all swimming pools and hot tubs in Miami?
